name: omin
description: AI workflow harness — spec-driven autonomous coding loop with multi-agent dispatch and self-healing test iteration.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven autonomous coding loop with self-healing test iteration
interface.longDescription: Omin enforces a spec-driven workflow: define architecture specs once, then run /omin <task> to enter a fully autonomous coding loop. The AI writes code, runs tests, self-heals on failure, and dispatches multiple sub-agents for complex tasks. Integrates with Claude Code and Codex CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use /omin spec to define architecture constraints before writing code.
Use /omin <task> to start a self-healing coding loop.
